title: Event Horizon: Chaos Mod
description: Event Horizon is a mod that triggers a completely random event every 60 seconds, altering gameplay - from harmless visual effects to global catastrophes!
body:
🎲 Random events every 60 seconds | 70+ unique effects | Fully customizable
--- ## 📌 About the Mod **Event Horizon** is a mod that triggers a completely random gameplay-altering event every 60 seconds — from harmless visual quirks to full-blown global catastrophes! ✨ **Key Features:** - **70+ unique events** (meteor showers, gravity shifts, mob spawns, and much more) - **Flexible configuration** — disable disliked events or adjust their duration - **Smooth control** — events last 2 minutes by default (fully customizable) - **Multi-language support** — English and Russian out of the box --- ## 🌍 Supported Languages | Language | Code | Status | |----------|------|--------| | English (US) | `en_us` | ✅ Minor inaccuracies possible | | Russian (Russia) | `ru_ru` | ✅ Full support | --- ## ⚙️ Installation ### Requirements: - **Minecraft:** 1.21.1 - **Neoforge:** 21.1.197+ ### Instructions: 1. Install **Neoforge Loader** for Minecraft 1.21.1 *(Note: This mod requires **NeoForge**, not Forge or Fabric!)* 2. Download the mod file from this page 3. Place the `.jar` file into your `.minecraft/mods` folder 4. Launch the game --- ## 🎮 Commands | Command | Description | Example | |--------|-------------|---------| | `/event start` | Start the event timer | `/event start` | | `/event pause` | Pause the event timer | `/event pause` | | `/event run ` | Trigger a specific event | `/event run adventureMode` | | `/event run ` | Trigger an event with custom duration (in seconds) | `/event run adventureMode 120` | | `/event clear` | Cancel all active events | `/event clear` | | `/event clear ` | Cancel a specific active event | `/event clear adventureMode` | --- ## ⚙️ Configuration **All settings are accessible via:** `Esc` → `Mods` → `Event Horizon` ### Main Options: - **Timer:** Enable/disable, adjust interval duration - **Events:** Toggle each event individually - **Duration:** Set custom duration for every event - **Client Settings:** Visual effects, sound notifications ✅ **All changes apply instantly — no world reload required!** --- ## 📜 License This mod is licensed under the **MIT License**. You are free to use, modify, and distribute it in accordance with the license terms. [Full license text](https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT)
